purpose: Clean non-profiled 8x target-shape validation for the MORI identical-dispatch-order shortcut after the profiler trace showed the synchronization tax removal.
command_shape: RUN_ID=torchtitan_direct_dsv4_mori_sharedkv_likl_tritonswiglu_identical_order_8x_s4096_gbs128_steps2_20260603 IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 GPUS_PER_NODE=8 CANARY_EP=8 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_MBS=1 CANARY_STEPS=2 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=full CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_MAX_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=shared_kv CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE=torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4.sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend CANARY_SHAREDKV_SCATTER_MODE=auto CANARY_LI_KL_BACKEND=triton_tl_dot CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_MORI_AITER_ASSUME_IDENTICAL_DISPATCH_ORDER=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_OP_CACHE_MODE=backward CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_REQUIRE_IDLE_GPUS=true MASTER_PORT=29583 launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run

comparison_to_prior_8x_tritonswiglu.target_read: Step2 is above the normalized throughput target band, but MFU remains low because the model is a 4-layer proxy and the flops accounting is not a final full-model MFU proof.

read: The shortcut is stable for a clean two-step target-shape 8x canary and improves step2 throughput from the retained 2648 tok/GPU/s line to 2720 tok/GPU/s. The paired profiler artifact attributes the saved time to removal of repeated MORI receive-count/source-position synchronization; remaining MoE backward work is local padded VJP, especially SwiGLU recompute ranges.
